name: scribe
description: Local transcription + skill-driven meeting notes. Records audio via the scribe CLI, then processes the artifact into a hive-mind vault note with speaker attribution, calendar attendees, and vault context.

vault_path.title: Vault Path
vault_path.description: Absolute path to your hive-mind Obsidian vault (e.g. /Users/you/code/hive-mind)

vault_collection.title: qmd Collection Name
vault_collection.description: Name of the qmd collection that indexes the vault

author_name.title: Author Name
author_name.description: Your display name as it appears in people/ notes

voice_similarity_threshold.title: Voice Similarity Threshold
voice_similarity_threshold.description: Cosine-similarity threshold for Pass A voice-enrollment auto-attribution. Default 0.75.
